growth_records.cite: Dethlefsen et al. Differences in codon bias cannot explain differences in translational power among microbes. BMC Bioinformatics (2005). DOI:10.1186/1471-2105-6-3. [PMC546186]
growth_records.notes: Table 1. Temp-corrected-to-37C mu range (col3)=0.30-0.43 hr-1 (max rates under different conditions); actual temp 39C; factor 0.85. Actual mu range = 0.30/0.85 to 0.43/0.85 = 0.353 to 0.506 hr-1; reported growth_rate_per_h=0.506 (upper). td at 0.506=1.37 h. Chemostat: D=mu. rrn copy# not available. Cited from refs [96,97]; secondary. No uptake/secretion/medium.
